channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Hacks season 5 episode 7 finally gives us the Ava-Deborah romance fan-fiction we've been waiting for — it's just a shame that none of it is real
item.description: Did we all just collectively hallucinate? Hacks season 5 episode 7 gave us the Ava-Deborah fan-fiction plot we've been dreaming about... but it's not exactly real.

item.title: Kobo's new 'whimsical' cases are gorgeous, but they aren't the hardware releases I was hoping for this year
item.description: Announced at BookCon 2026, Kobo has released some new limited-edition "collector" cases for its ereaders while we're still waiting for a new ereader from the Japanese-Canadian brand.
